title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
* IDBI Bank Personal Loan offers instant sanction and quick disbursement, ensuring a fast and seamless borrowing experience for customers. 
  * The loan can be availed through a simple, user-friendly digital journey, enabling end-to-end processing without the need for any physical documentation.


  * All salaried individuals having existing liability relationship with the Bank





  
| All purposes except speculative and illegitimate purposes  |  
| --- |  
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)

metadata.description: IDBI Bank Personal loans offer you flexible repayment schedule and lower interest rates. Avail a personal loan or overdraft facility in easy steps
metadata.keywords: Personal Loan, Personal Loan India, personal loan calculator, overdraft facility
